overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat exploring a dark gothic cathedral interior. The character moves through various connected spaces including a forge room, stone corridors, a ruined great hall, and a grand cathedral chamber, all lit by warm firelight and torches.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval forge room with workbench and fire pit

events.description: character exits the forge room through a stone archway into a corridor

agents.ego_description: walking around the forge room examining the workbench and tools before heading toward the exit

entered.detail: burning fire pit with metal tools nearby providing warm orange light
sturdy wooden table with various tools and materials scattered on top
wall-mounted rack holding various metal implements and weapons
thick stone column supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character explores a small enclosed forge room lit by a central fire pit. Wooden workbenches and tool racks line the stone walls. After examining the area, the character walks toward a stone archway exit at the far end of the room.

events.description: enters narrow stone corridor from the forge room
approaching brighter area at the end of the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor toward the large archway at the end

entered.detail: large stone arch marking the transition to the next area
iron bracket with burning torch mounted on the stone wall
rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The rough stone walls create an enclosed atmosphere as the character approaches a large archway at the far end where light grows brighter.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined great hall with collapsed walls and rubble

events.description: exits corridor into large ruined hall with broken walls and fallen columns
moving into darker area with only distant torch light visible through broken walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through the rubble-strewn great hall between massive stone columns

entered.detail: collapsed section of wall revealing the dark exterior
tall cylindrical stone pillar supporting the high ceiling
scattered stones and broken masonry covering the floor

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast ruined hall where the ceiling has partially collapsed. Massive stone columns stand among rubble and debris. Broken walls reveal dark openings, and the lighting becomes dimmer with only distant firelight illuminating the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level corridor and storage area with large window

events.description: character begins ascending stone staircase to upper level
entering storage room with wooden crates and large window opening

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and moving through upper corridors toward a storage area with crates

entered.detail: worn stone steps leading upward to the next level
stacked wooden boxes and storage containers
tall arched window revealing dark night sky outside

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase to an upper level, moving through narrower corridors. The area transitions into a storage room filled with wooden crates and barrels, featuring a large window that reveals the dark night outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral interior with high altar and balconies

events.description: entering the vast cathedral hall from the storage corridor
approaching the illuminated altar area with multiple fire sources

agents.ego_description: walking through the cathedral approaching the central altar and examining the workbench area to the side

entered.detail: elevated stone platform with glowing fires and ceremonial objects
massive gothic columns reaching to the high vaulted ceiling
stacked barrels and storage containers along the wall
cluttered workbench with various tools and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent cathedral interior with towering gothic pillars and a high vaulted ceiling. The central altar is illuminated by multiple fire sources. The character walks toward the altar, passing wooden barrels and a cluttered workbench area in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of gothic interiors that transition from a cramped forge into a vast, soaring cathedral. It begins within a small, enclosed forge room lit by a central fire pit, moving past wooden workbenches toward a stone archway. As the character exits, the scene shifts into a narrow stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches before opening up into a ruined hall filled with massive columns and fallen debris. The camera then ascends a stone staircase through narrow passages and a storage room cluttered with crates, passing a window that reveals the dark night outside. Finally, the space expands into a magnificent cathedral interior with towering gothic pillars and a high vaulted ceiling, moving past a cluttered workbench toward a central altar bathed in firelight.
